pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.2.x does not support Java 17; compilation or runtime will fail due to unsupported bytecode version or removed internal APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 17 to compile and run on the new JDK; otherwise, it defaults to the old version or fails to utilize J17 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Spring Cloud Hystrix starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: spring-cloud-starter-netflix-hystrix was removed in Spring Cloud 2020.0.0 (Ilford) and later; including it causes a dependency resolution failure or missing class errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Spring Cloud Sleuth starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: spring-cloud-starter-sleuth was removed in Spring Cloud 2020.0.0 (Ilford) and later; including it causes a dependency resolution failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated Spring Cloud Zipkin starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: spring-cloud-starter-zipkin was removed in Spring Cloud 2020.0.0 (Ilford) and later; including it causes a dependency resolution failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud BOM version to a release compatible with Spring Boot 2.7.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Hoxton is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.7; using it causes dependency conflicts or runtime failures.
